meaning: adj.琐细的,无用的,无效果的,(人)没有出息的
examples: It would be futile to protest.
Like many in Russia, she blamed the country's failings on futile attempts to catch up with the West.
To date, the sum of my gardening experience had been futile efforts to rid the flower beds of grass.
Some cynics, though, say that it is futile to make arguments for good policy.
The IRS made reasonable attempts to collect from the transferor or it would be futile .
